a:r.a:t: What the current prototype already supports
Purpose: Centralizes patient profiles, visits, APE, and referrals
Purpose: Tracks document review, submission, follow-up, and clearance
Purpose: Lets students request consultations for staff approval
Purpose: Scores urgency from symptoms, vitals, BP, pulse, and keywords
Purpose: Provides a tokenized emergency-ready health link
Purpose: Sends pending alerts through dashboard polling
